roles.name: Star Sage
roles.description: Guardian of the Power Stars — designs the over-arching solution and keeps every warp pipe aligned.

roles.name: Castle Steward
roles.description: Marshals the delivery crew, holds the timeline, and answers to the Princess.

roles.name: Toad Quartermaster
roles.description: Steward of records, layouts, fields and permission sets — keeps the castle running.

roles.name: Block Smasher
roles.description: Forges Apex, LWC, and platform features — leaves no `?` block uncracked.

roles.name: Plumber Foreman of the West
roles.description: Captain over all Salesforce craft — sets standards and guides the senior plumbers.

roles.name: Senior Pipe Engineer of Sarasaland
roles.description: Patrols the borders of customer requirements with practiced craft.

roles.name: Pipe Engineer of Sarasaland
roles.description: Carries discovery and configuration across the kingdom under the senior engineer's eye.

roles.name: Warp Zone Architect
roles.description: Architect of the great pipes between Salesforce and the realms beyond.

roles.name: Senior Warp Pipe Builder
roles.description: Lays the iron of API, middleware, and event flows under the Warp Zone Architect's plan.

roles.name: Warp Pipe Apprentice
roles.description: Learns the craft of integration — webhooks, batch, callouts and the Koopa patterns of error handling.

roles.name: Lakitu Inspector
roles.description: Floats above the build with a camera and a clipboard — finds bugs before they reach the Princess.

roles.name: Trumpet of the Mushroom Herald
roles.description: Lifts the banner and trumpet for product and message — leads all marketing craft.

roles.name: Senior Bandstand Conductor
roles.description: Strategist of campaigns — sounds the call to gather and convert across the kingdom.

roles.name: Toad Town Crier
roles.description: Carries the campaign forward into the field — content, creative, and the daily drumbeat.

roles.name: Royal Cartographer
roles.description: Records what is needed and what is promised — translates between mortal Customer and the toadly craft of design.

roles.name: Master Builder of Yoshi's Island
roles.description: Senior platform craftsman — builds the load-bearing pillars and mentors the junior smashers.

roles.name: Junior Pipe Apprentice
roles.description: Learns the craft from the ground up — clones flows, builds reports, gathers requirements under guidance.

_realmNotes: windowOffsetWeeks values are negative so every realm starts at least one month in the past — past weeks get Time Entries (Step 6), future weeks get Schedules. Workstreams are organised as parent scope items (each with 2-3 child sub-scopes) — the wizard inserts parents first, then children with Parent_WorkStream__c set.

realms.projectName: Mushroom Kingdom — Royal Castle CRM Rollout
Bowser's Castle — Koopa Troop Logistics Platform
Donkey Kong Island — Banana Hoard Surveillance Build
Wario Land & WarioWare — Microgame Analytics Implementation

mushroom-kingdom.name: Light the Castle Lanterns
mushroom-kingdom.description: Discovery sign-off — castle lanterns lit from Toad Town to Star Hill.

mushroom-kingdom.name: Reforging the Star Rod
mushroom-kingdom.description: Build kickoff: the kingdom's wand reforged for the journey ahead.

mushroom-kingdom.name: Audience at Peach's Throne
mushroom-kingdom.description: Mid-project gate: stewardship review with Toadsworth's council.

mushroom-kingdom.name: Bowser Diversion
mushroom-kingdom.description: Phase invoice trigger: feint at the Koopa front to draw the eye.

mushroom-kingdom.name: Coronation of the Princess
mushroom-kingdom.description: Go-Live: the crown returns to Peach's Castle.

mushroom-kingdom.name: Toadsworth's Hand-off
mushroom-kingdom.description: Hyper-care close: stewardship passed to Toadsworth.

bowser-castle-koopa-troop.name: Muster at Bowser's Castle
bowser-castle-koopa-troop.description: Project kickoff: the Koopa Troop assembled in the keep.

bowser-castle-koopa-troop.name: March on Mushroom Kingdom
bowser-castle-koopa-troop.description: Build phase: airships deployed across the realm.

bowser-castle-koopa-troop.name: Charge of the Koopalings
bowser-castle-koopa-troop.description: Go-Live: the Koopalings break the siege.

bowser-castle-koopa-troop.name: Return to the Lava Throne
bowser-castle-koopa-troop.description: Hyper-care close: the King Koopa returns home.

bowser-castle-koopa-troop.name: Final Ransom Notice
bowser-castle-koopa-troop.description: Final invoice: the closing of the Koopa ledger.

donkey-kong-island.name: Forge the Barrel Cannons
donkey-kong-island.description: Build: the barrel-cannon network deployed across the island.

donkey-kong-island.name: Cranky's Audit
donkey-kong-island.description: Solution review with the elder Kong himself.

donkey-kong-island.name: Hoard Goes Dark
donkey-kong-island.description: Project close: surveillance suspended, vault locked.

donkey-kong-island.name: Final Reckoning
donkey-kong-island.description: Final invoice from the Kong Family.

wario-land-warioware.name: Council of Wario
wario-land-warioware.description: Kickoff council in Diamond City — coins on the table.

wario-land-warioware.name: Gaze into the Microgame
wario-land-warioware.description: Discovery: reports modelled from 5-second microgame data.

wario-land-warioware.name: Weave the Coin Reports
wario-land-warioware.description: Build: dashboards woven of garlic and gold.

wario-land-warioware.name: Treasure Reveal at Diamond City
wario-land-warioware.description: UAT acceptance: prizes handed to each crew member.

wario-land-warioware.name: Cashing Out at the Bank
wario-land-warioware.description: Go-Live + handoff: Wario rolls in the coins.

wario-land-warioware.name: Final Recompense
wario-land-warioware.description: Final invoice from Wario Inc. — paid in coins.

Mario.notes: Princess rescue mission — pre-arranged kidnapping response.

Luigi.notes: Ghost-hunting at Luigi's Mansion — Polterpup birthday.

Toadsworth.notes: Steward's sabbatical — visiting Toad Town elders.

Bowser.notes: Annual lava spa retreat — back stronger.

Bowser Jr..notes: Paintbrush art class with Shadow Mario.

Cranky Kong.notes: Council of the Kong elders — semi-annual griping.

Funky Kong.notes: Surf trip to Krocodile Isle waves.

Waluigi.notes: Tennis practice — needs to be in the next game.
